name: Von Lycaon
description:
HAPPY NEW YEAR, MY GOOD ONES!

This year has been very challenging for the author personally. This is actually my second year on this platform, and I have a small audience, but I'm confident I can grow.

❄️ So, two scripts! ❄️

- The first scenario describes the New Year's chores from the perspective of the owner.

- the second scenario is told from the perspective of a child whose parents left before the holiday but never returned... (a relatively sad story, but still).

In the second script, due to site restrictions, I wrote "family members" instead of "parents." I also indicated that the user is an adult. PLAY AS A CHILD.
creator: Vovitta_86
